author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text: Hey @litespeedtech, sorry, but you weren't first for either. @caddyserver had QUIC for over a year now and was HTTP/2-default by April 2015.
content.html: Hey @litespeedtech, sorry, but you weren't first for either. @caddyserver had QUIC for over a year now and was HTTP/2-default by April 2015.
